response.step_by_step_log:
1. Song "To Aru Ryuu no Koi no Uta": Identified via on-screen text. Performed by Shishiro Botan and Shishiro Riona. Search query: "とある竜の恋の歌 lyrics Japanese and English". Successfully retrieved lyrics.
2. Song "Into Gray": Identified via on-screen text during the animated segment. Performed by Shishiro Botan and Shishiro Riona. Search query: "Into Gray 獅白ぼたん lyrics Japanese and English". Successfully retrieved lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features two songs performed by Shishiro Botan and Shishiro Riona. The first segment consists of a live performance of 'To Aru Ryuu no Koi no Uta'. This is followed by a visual novel-style narrative segment with dialogue, leading into the second song, 'Into Gray', which is presented as an animated music video.

scenes.description: Shishiro Botan and Shishiro Riona perform the song 'To Aru Ryuu no Koi no Uta' on a concert stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Draco in fabula
In dracone hora
In dracone spes
In dracone error
In dracone veritas
In dracone somnium
In dracone fatum
In dracone causa
In dracone amor

音のない大地に
恋の歌 響けば
狂い出す歯車
止められぬ宿命 (さだめ)が
弾けた

蘇る 今
古より
寂寞の恋 目覚めた
絆を求めて
炎はほとばしる
破壊と再生
気高き君の呪縛
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Draco in fabula (Dragon in legend)
In dracone hora (Time within the dragon)
In dracone spes (Hope in the dragon)
In dracone error (Confusion within the dragon)
In dracone veritas (Truth sleeping in the dragon)
In dracone somnium (Illusion in the dragon)
In dracone fatum (Fate reflected in the dragon)
In dracone causa (Reason sealed in the dragon)
In dracone amor (Love within the dragon)

If a love song resounds on the silent earth
The gears start to go mad
The inescapable fate
Has burst open

Reviving, now
From ancient times
A desolate love has awakened
Seeking bonds
The flames surge
Destruction and rebirth
The spell of your noble self

scenes.description: An animated music video for the song 'Into Gray', featuring Shishiro Botan and Shishiro Riona.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
なにを求めるのか
誰を愛するのかさえ
わからず

灰のように朽ちていく心に
あなたのかけらだけは
手探りでも
かたちをなぞれば

長い眠りの中
あなたを夢見る
ふたり見慣れた
あの日々を何度でも
夜明けはあなたにだけ
空にはもう果てがないから
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What are you seeking?
What are you loving?
Even that... I don't know

In a heart decaying like ash
Only your fragments
Even if groping in the dark
If I trace the shape

In a long sleep
I dream of you
The days we were accustomed to
Together, again and again
Dawn belongs only to you
In the sky
There is no longer any end, is there?
